caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio with grey acoustic foam panels on the wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small logo on the chest that reads "Omit". He is positioned in front of a silver professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting slightly; he begins with a slight smile and closed lips, then opens his mouth to speak, momentarily closes it, and opens it again. His gaze remains fixed forward and slightly to the side, away from the microphone. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on the man from the chest up.
